hooks.name: Guard READ-ONLY Files
hooks.description: Prevents writing to files marked with # READ-ONLY at the top

action.prompt: Before writing to any Python file, check if it begins with "# READ-ONLY". If it does, do NOT proceed with the edit. Explain to the user that the file is marked as immutable and suggest alternatives (regenerating from source, creating a new file, or asking the user for explicit override).
